name: White Chocolate Truffles
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt white chocolate with whipping cream in a heavy saucepan over low heat, stirring constantly. Whisk in the liqueur and zest until blended. Pour into a pie pan. Refrigerate until mixture is fudgy but soft, about 2 hours.
2. Shape about 1 tablespoon of the mixture into 1 1/4 inch balls. Roll the balls in your palms to shape. Place on waxed paper.
3. Sift sugar into a shallow bowl.
4. Roll each ball in sugar and place in petit four or candy cases.
5. Truffles can be refrigerated for 2-3 days or frozen several weeks. Makes about 35 truffles.
